case_title: SERGEY LITVINENKO et al VS. MAY LEE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-02-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-02-2012 BY BETSY JOHNSEN. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LINDA HU--CANTONESE INTERPRETER. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT LEE, MAY MAILED TO RESPONDENT LITVINENKO, SERGEY KAHL, ERIKA
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-11-2012 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT LEE, MAY TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT LITVINENKO, SERGEY JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF APPELLANT MAY LEE AND AGAINST THE RESPONDENT SERGEY LITVINENKO. EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES. THE SUBJECT CONTRACTUAL PROVISION FOR ATTORNEY FEES APPLIES TO "ANY LEGAL ACTION." A CLAIM BROUGHT BEFORE THE RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBITRATION BOARD IS NOT A LEGAL ACTION. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR COMPLETE DETAILS. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$95.00) SERVED APR-10-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, MAY
STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE-BETSY JOHNSEN TO HEAR THEIR CASE AT TO-DAYS HEARING. FILED BY LITVINENKO, SERGEY KAHL, ERIKA LEE, MAY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LITVINENKO, SERGEY KAHL, ERIKA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, MAY $6,202.50 PRINCIPAL, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,372.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: SUBSTITUTED FOR COOC, HOA T. AS ATTORNEY FOR LEE, MAY
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR JUL-11-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-11-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-11-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MAY.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY LEE, MAY LITVINENKO, SERGEY KAHL, ERIKA
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (DEFENDENT/APPELLANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-11-2012 - JUDGMENT ENTERED. JPT DAVID MAY, CLERK- PARAM NATT, NOT RECORDED, DEPT. 525.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,343.75 FILED BY LITVINENKO, SERGEY KAHL, ERIKA AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, MAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF LITVINENKO, SERGEY KAHL, ERIKA ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2012 - JUDGMENT.

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-20-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:48AM
Judge Pro Tem David May, Clerk-P. Natt, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, May Lee was represented by Counsel Hoa T. Cooc. Respondent Sergey Litvinenko was represented by Counsel John R. Weinstein. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge May.
11:26AM
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-04-2012 Judgment Entered
